name: Ebbli
description: Ebbli - Keep ChatGPT flow moving fast.

scripts.version:sync: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const pkg=require('./package.json'); ['extension/manifest.chrome.json','extension/manifest.firefox.json'].forEach(f=>{ const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8')); j.version=pkg.version; fs.writeFileSync(f, JSON.stringify(j, null, 2) + '\n'); }); console.log('Synced manifest versions to', pkg.version);"
scripts.build:prod: rimraf extension/.dev && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node build.cjs
scripts.build:prod:firefox: rimraf extension/.dev && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node build.cjs --target=firefox
scripts.build:prod:chrome: rimraf extension/.dev && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node build.cjs --target=chrome
scripts.package:firefox: npm run test && npm run build:prod:firefox && web-ext build --source-dir=extension --artifacts-dir=web-ext-artifacts --overwrite-dest
scripts.package:chrome: npm run test && npm run build:prod:chrome && bestzip web-ext-artifacts/Ebbli-chrome.zip extension/manifest.json extension/dist/**/* extension/popup/**/* extension/icons/**/*
scripts.package:source: bestzip web-ext-artifacts/Ebbli-source.zip package.json package-lock.json README.md build.cjs extension/src/**/* extension/popup/**/* extension/icons/**/* extension/manifest.chrome.json extension/manifest.firefox.json tests/**/*
scripts.package:all: npm run package:firefox && npm run package:chrome && npm run package:source

author: Ebbli Contributors
